sentences.target: Tu sais où est la gare.

translations.fr: Tu sais où est la gare.
translations.en: You know where the train station is.
translations.es: Sabes dónde está la estación de tren.
translations.de: Du weißt, wo der Bahnhof ist.
translations.ko: 너는 기차역이 어디 있는지 알고 있어.
translations.pt: Você sabe onde fica a estação de trem.
translations.he: אתה יודע איפה נמצאת תחנת הרכבת.
translations.vi: Bạn biết ga tàu ở đâu.
translations.ar: أنت تعرف أين تقع محطة القطار.
translations.nl: Je weet waar het treinstation is.
translations.hi: तुम्हें पता है कि रेलवे स्टेशन कहाँ है.
translations.el: Ξέρεις πού είναι ο σιδηροδρομικός σταθμός.
translations.id: Kamu tahu di mana stasiun kereta berada.
translations.ja: あなたは駅がどこにあるか知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects an embedded interrogative clause.
Interrogative adverb introducing an indirect question (embedded interrogative) functioning as the complement of 'sais'.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular, linking the subject 'la gare' with the interrogative locative.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'gare'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the embedded clause.

sentences.target: Je ne sais pas où tu habites.
sentences.reading: /ʒə nə sɛ pa u ty abit/

translations.fr: Je ne sais pas où tu habites.
translations.ipa: /ʒə nə sɛ pa u ty abit/
translations.en: I don't know where you live.
translations.de: Ich weiß nicht, wo du wohnst.
translations.ru: Я не знаю, где ты живёшь.
translations.pt: Eu não sei onde você mora.
translations.he: אני לא יודע איפה אתה גר.
translations.vi: Tôi không biết bạn sống ở đâu.
translations.nl: Ik weet niet waar je woont.
translations.uk: Я не знаю, де ти живеш.
translations.hi: मुझे नहीं पता कि तुम कहाँ रहते हो.
translations.nb: Jeg vet ikke hvor du bor.
translations.id: Aku tidak tahu di mana kamu tinggal.
translations.sv: Jag vet inte var du bor.
translations.da: Jeg ved ikke, hvor du bor.
translations.ja: あなたがどこに住んでいるか知りません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Proclitic negative particle; first part of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a content clause headed by 'où'.
Negative adverb completing the discontinuous negation with 'ne'.
Interrogative adverb introducing the subordinate clause (indirect question) that is the complement of 'sais'.
Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular of the embedded clause.
Main verb of the embedded clause, present indicative, 2nd person singular.

sentences.target: Voici le parc où on se retrouve.
sentences.reading: /vwa.si lə paʁk u ɔ̃ sə ʁə.tʁuv/

translations.fr: Voici le parc où on se retrouve.
translations.ipa: /vwa.si lə paʁk u ɔ̃ sə ʁə.tʁuv/
translations.en: Here is the park where we meet.
translations.es: Aquí está el parque donde nos encontramos.
translations.de: Hier ist der Park, in dem wir uns treffen.
translations.it: Ecco il parco dove ci incontriamo.
translations.zh-Hans: 这就是我们见面的公园。
translations.yue: 呢度就係我哋見面嘅公園。
translations.pt: Aqui está o parque onde nos encontramos.
translations.vi: Đây là công viên nơi chúng ta gặp nhau.
translations.ar: هذه هي الحديقة التي نلتقي فيها.
translations.nl: Hier is het park waar we elkaar ontmoeten.
translations.hu: Itt van a park, ahol találkozunk.
translations.hi: यह वही पार्क है जहाँ हम मिलते हैं.
translations.pl: Oto park, w którym się spotykamy.
translations.el: Εδώ είναι το πάρκο όπου συναντιόμαστε.
translations.nb: Her er parken der vi møtes.
translations.sv: Här är parken där vi ses.
translations.cs: Tady je park, kde se scházíme.
translations.da: Her er parken, hvor vi mødes.
translations.ja: ここが私たちが会う公園です。

tokens.explanation: Presentative adverb introducing/foregrounding the following noun phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'parc'.
Common noun, masculine singular; the entity being presented.
Relative adverb introducing a relative clause that modifies 'parc' (locative meaning).
Impersonal/indefinite subject pronoun; agrees with 3rd person singular verb forms.
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun forming the pronominal verb 'se retrouver'.
Lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; with 'se' forms 'se retrouver' = 'to meet up'.

sentences.target: Montre-moi où tu as mis les clés.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃tʁə mwa u ty a mi le kle/

translations.fr: Montre-moi où tu as mis les clés.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃tʁə mwa u ty a mi le kle/
translations.en: Show me where you put the keys.
translations.de: Zeig mir, wo du die Schlüssel hingelegt hast.
translations.it: Mostrami dove hai messo le chiavi.
translations.zh-Hans: 给我看看你把钥匙放在哪里。
translations.yue: 畀我睇下你把鎖匙擺喺邊度。
translations.ru: Покажи мне, где ты положил ключи.
translations.he: תראה לי איפה שמת את המפתחות.
translations.vi: Cho tôi xem bạn đã để chìa khóa ở đâu.
translations.nl: Laat me zien waar je de sleutels hebt neergelegd.
translations.uk: Покажи мені, де ти поклав ключі.
translations.hu: Mutasd meg, hova tetted a kulcsokat.
translations.hi: मुझे दिखाओ कि तुमने चाबियाँ कहाँ रखी हैं.
translations.el: Δείξε μου πού έβαλες τα κλειδιά.
translations.nb: Vis meg hvor du la nøklene.
translations.id: Tunjukkan kepada saya di mana kamu menaruh kunci.
translations.sv: Visa mig var du lade nycklarna.
translations.cs: Ukaž mi, kam jsi dal klíče.
translations.da: Vis mig, hvor du lagde nøglerne.
translations.ja: 鍵をどこに置いたか見せてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular of 'montrer' with enclitic indirect-object pronoun 'moi' attached by hyphen; governs an embedded interrogative.
Interrogative adverb introducing the subordinate clause that is the object/complement of 'Montre-moi'.
Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular of the embedded clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the passé composé with the past participle 'mis'.
Past participle; main lexical verb in compound tense with auxiliary 'as'.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'clés'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'as mis'.
